error.cannot_connect: The spa is not reachable at this address (TCP port 6668). Check the IP address and make sure the spa is connected to your wifi.
error.invalid_key: The spa is reachable but rejects the request. Check the Device ID and Local Key. Note: the Local Key changes every time the spa is re-paired with the app.

user.description: Local control of a Tuya-based Intex PureSpa ('TY' control panel). You need the Device ID and Local Key from the Tuya IoT platform, see the README.
